steps.title: Remove the known part
steps.content:
The total length is $123$ centimeters, and one part is $55$ centimeters. The two equal parts together have length
$$123-55=68$$

steps.title: Divide between equal parts
steps.content:
The remaining $68$ centimeters are split into two equal parts:
$$68\div2=34$$
The answer is 34.
